page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d2s.10xlarge is a storage-focused instance type within the ecs.d2s family. It features 40 physical cores and 40 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The CPU allocation is dedicated, with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, meaning hyperthreading is not utilized. The instance is equipped with 176.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 4.4 GB of RAM per core.

A primary characteristic of this instance is its massive local storage capacity, consisting of 117,574 GB of local HDD storage. While this provides high density for large-scale data retention, the use of HDD technology represents a performance tradeoff compared to solid-state drives in terms of random IOPS and latency. The instance also features a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps and runs on the KVM hypervisor. No GPU accelerators are present on this server.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.d2s.10xlarge offers high storage density per resource unit, making it suitable for workloads requiring massive sequential data capacity without the premium cost of SSD storage. Appropriate workloads include large-scale data warehousing, log processing, MapReduce deployments, and big data storage systems that can tolerate HDD latency profiles.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d2s.10xlarge is a storage-focused instance featuring 40 dedicated vCPUs and 40 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture with a KVM hypervisor, it provides 176.0 GB of RAM, yielding 4.4 GB per core. The defining feature of this instance is its massive 117,574 GB of local HDD storage, which offers high capacity but presents a performance tradeoff in random IOPS compared to SSDs. It includes a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps and does not feature GPU acceleration. This hardware profile is designed for high-capacity storage workloads, big data processing, and large-scale data warehousing where sequential storage volume is prioritized over low-latency random access.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d2s.10xlarge is a storage-focused instance with 40 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 176 GB RAM, and 117,574 GB of local HDD storage, designed for high-capacity sequential data workloads.

tagline: A high-capacity storage instance featuring forty dedicated Intel Xeon cores and over one hundred and seventeen terabytes of local HDD storage.
bullet_points: 40 dedicated physical cores and vCPUs with no hyperthreading
176.0 GB of system memory providing 4.4 GB per core
117,574 GB of local HDD storage for high-density data capacity
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor
Suited for big data, MapReduce, and large-scale data warehousing
